title: MS MARCO - Passage Relevance Ranking
description: Passage relevance ranking based on the MS MARCO dataset (Nguyen et al., NeurIPS 2016 Workshop). Annotators assess the relevance of a candidate passage to a given search query using a graded relevance scale.
citation:
@inproceedings{nguyen2016msmarco,
    title = "{MS MARCO}: A Human Generated {MA}chine Reading {CO}mprehension Dataset",
    author = "Nguyen, Tri and Rosenberg, Markus and Song, Xia and Gao, Jianfeng and Tiwary, Saurabh and Majumder, Rangan and Deng, Li",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Workshop on Cognitive Computation: Integrating Neural and Symbolic Approaches (NeurIPS 2016)",
    year = "2016",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/1611.09268"
}
